query: heavy 35mm film grain noise texture analog photography
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: heavy 35mm grain, noise textures, gritty analog

response.objective_caption: An extreme close-up photograph of a textured woven fabric surface, rendered in black and white. The diagonal weave pattern shows rows of interlaced threads with subtle highlights catching along the raised portions of the material. The image focuses on a shallow depth strip of sharp detail across the center, with the foreground and background falling into softer resolution.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An extreme close-up photograph of a textured woven fabric surface in black and white, where the diagonal weave pattern dissolves into smeared, mushy ambiguity across most of the frame. Only a narrow band of indistinct texture resolves with any clarity, while the remainder of the threads, surfaces, and interlaced details collapse into hazy, indeterminate gray tones without clear form.
